problem: MetaBlooms governed work became difficult to follow because stage responses did not consistently surface current bootable authority, active chain, completed chain, and next pointer.
requirements: Before a governed stage final response, render or cite the current operator tracker preview.
Every final governed-stage response must state whether a full bootable OS export exists and identify the latest full authority ZIP/checksum.
Every final governed-stage response must distinguish required next work from optional branch work.
If the tracker cannot be rendered or located, fail closed and write a blocked receipt instead of continuing implementation.
Append-log stream classification remains optional until a user explicitly resumes that chain.
